meta.title: OpenSells | B2B Lead Generation & Automated Prospecting
meta.description: Find verified B2B leads, send AI-personalized cold emails and automate your sales prospecting. For freelancers and agencies.
meta.ogDescription: Find verified leads and send AI-personalized email sequences. Start free.

hero.headline: Generate B2B Leads and Automate Your Prospecting
hero.subheadline: Find verified contacts, send AI-personalized email sequences and close more deals. No manual work.

items.text: 15+ hours per week finding contacts and writing emails manually
Low reply rates due to generic, non-personalized outreach
Impossible to scale without an automated system that actually works

features.title: Everything you need to prospect at scale
features.subtitle: No tool switching. No learning curve.

items.title: Verified B2B database
items.description: Find companies and verified contacts in seconds. No outdated lists or bounced emails.

items.title: AI-generated emails
items.description: AI reads the lead's website and writes a personalized email in their context. No two emails are the same.

items.title: Automated sequences
items.description: Set up to 4 automatic follow-up emails. The system stops when a reply comes in.

items.title: Search by niche and city
items.description: Find leads by industry, city and keywords. Specific results for your target market.

items.title: Results tracking
items.description: See which emails work, which leads replied and how many you've contacted. All in a clear dashboard.

items.title: Unlimited CSV export
items.description: Export your leads to any CRM or tool. Your data is yours, with no restrictions.

how.title: From zero to leads in 3 steps

steps.title: Define your niche and city
steps.description: Enter the industry you're targeting and the city. OpenSells finds real companies with verified emails.

steps.title: Review your leads
steps.description: Get a list of companies with name, domain, email and phone. Filter the ones you're most interested in.

steps.title: Send with AI personalization
steps.description: AI generates a unique email for each lead based on their website. Open it in Gmail or Outlook with one click.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Scale when you need it.
pricing.discount_note: 🎉 50% off your first month on paid plans

items.q: What's the difference between Free and Professional?
items.a: The Free plan lets you run 2 searches per month and generate 5 AI emails to try the platform. The Professional plan includes 500 monthly leads, 100 AI emails, unlimited CSV export and full access to all features.
Yes. OpenSells fetches emails directly from company websites and verifies them before showing them to you. The AI also personalizes each email based on the real content of the lead's website.
Yes, B2B cold email targeting businesses is legal and compatible with GDPR when done with legitimate commercial interest. OpenSells is designed for professional B2B use.

items.q: Will my emails land in spam?
items.a: OpenSells generates drafts that you open in your own Gmail or Outlook account. This ensures your domain's reputation determines deliverability, not ours.

items.q: Can I change plans at any time?
items.a: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade whenever you want from your user dashboard. Changes take effect from the next billing period.

items.q: What happens to my data if I cancel?
items.a: Your data is yours. You can export all your leads as CSV before cancelling. We keep your history for 30 days after cancellation in case you change your mind.

items.q: How quickly can I see results?
items.a: Most users get their first lead list in under 5 minutes. The first email replies typically arrive 3 to 7 days after the first send.

items.q: Does it work for any industry or city?
items.a: Yes. OpenSells searches across your target market by industry and city. It works especially well for professional services: marketing, design, consulting, tech, real estate and more.
